n: Book 6, Chapter 2: The Ghost in the Gap

steps.t: Wilfrith is in Forthbrond, to the west of Grimbold's Camp. Grimbold thinks you should travel to Forthbrond and speak with Wilfrith for information abo…
You caught a glimpse of gold from the western side of the Warg-warrens of Âthdâr. You should investigate the golden glimpse you saw at Âthdâr.
You have spied another glint of gold to the west of Âthdâr, where two trails meet. A member of the Draig-lûth killed by a sword-stroke clutched gold p…
You have spied another glint of gold to the west of the small pile of gold you discovered. Someone has been leaving small piles of gold pieces in the …
You have spotted another glint of gold to the south-west of the gold coins you discovered, to the west of Cuvnerth. You are following a trail of gold …
You have found Nona in the Gap of Rohan, west of Cuvnerth. You should tell Nona about the troubling dream.
